summary:
FXIFY Futures ranked 1st out of 12 futures prop firms we've tested firsthand, earning a score of 88/100. It offers a one-step evaluation, high profit splits, and no time limits. You can get funded up to $150K with no recurring fees.

The FFX Platform doesn't support third-party tools like NinjaTrader, but built-in TradingView charts and real-time CME data give you everything needed to trade futures efficiently.
bestFor: Serious futures traders who want high profit splits, no time limits, and transparent pricing on CME markets
notIdealFor: Traders who prefer third-party platforms like NinjaTrader or Rithmic, or need structured educational content

categorySections.challenges:
FXIFY Futures offers two challenge types — **Starter Plan** and **Expert Plan** — across $50K, $100K, and $150K account sizes. Both are one-step evaluations with no time limits.

The Starter Plan has a minimum of 4 trading days, 80% profit split (upgradeable to 90%), and lower monthly fees from **$89**. The Expert Plan requires 3 trading days minimum, offers 90% profit split (upgradeable to 100%), no activation fee, and higher position limits up to 15 contracts.

Optional add-ons include a 10% profit split increase and daily drawdown removal (Expert only). A consistency rule limits single-day profits to 30% (Starter) or 40% (Expert) of total profits. FXIFY Futures scored 9/10 for challenges.
categorySections.spreads:
FXIFY Futures uses round-turn pricing covering both opening and closing trades, including regulatory fees ($0.04 per trade) and exchange-specific costs. CME Equity Futures (ES, NQ) cost **$2.80** round-turn, Micro Equity Futures **$0.74**, CME FX Futures **$3.24**, and Micro FX **$0.52**.

Pricing is competitive with Topstep and other leading futures prop firms, with lower fees on index futures and cost-effective micro contract rates. FXIFY Futures scored 9/10 for spreads and pricing.
categorySections.markets:
FXIFY Futures provides access to a wide range of CME futures markets including **equity futures** (ES, NQ), **micro equity** (MES, MNQ), **foreign exchange** (6E, 6B), **crude oil & energy** (CL, NG), **CBOT commodities** (ZC, ZW, ZS), **COMEX metals** (GC, SI, HG), **micro metals** (MGC, SIL), and **interest rate futures** (ZN, ZB).

All markets use real-time CME data feeds. FXIFY Futures scored a perfect 10/10 for markets.
categorySections.platforms:
FXIFY Futures operates exclusively on its proprietary **FFX Platform**, a web-based trading system. It does not support NinjaTrader, Rithmic, or Tradovate.

The FFX Platform includes TradingView-powered charting, real-time CME data feed, bracket orders with drag-and-drop controls, and automatic contract rollovers. Level 1 data is free; Level 2 data costs **$39/month**. EAs are not currently supported but may be added in the future. FXIFY Futures scored 7/10 for platforms.
categorySections.payouts:
Profit splits range from **80% to 100%** depending on plan and add-ons. Payouts are available every 14 days via bank transfer or crypto through **Riseworks**. A buffer zone must be maintained before withdrawals — $500–$1,500 (Starter) or $1,000–$2,000 (Expert) depending on account size.

Payouts follow a tiered system: 60% on first withdrawal, scaling to 100% from the fifth withdrawal onwards. No recurring fees after funding. KYC verification required. FXIFY Futures scored 9/10 for payouts.
categorySections.support: FXIFY Futures provides support through **live chat** and **email**. The Discord community offers trading discussions and payout proof channels. However, formal educational resources such as webinars or courses are not available — guidance is limited to platform guides, Help Center content, and community discussions.
categorySections.trust:
FXIFY Futures is linked to **FXIFY** (CFD prop firm) and **FXPIG** (regulated forex broker), which adds credibility. Trustpilot score is **3.9/5** but based on only 4 reviews, making it too early to gauge a strong reputation.

The firm maintains an active Discord server with weekly payout updates and payout proof channels. Social media presence is still developing. FXIFY Futures scored 9/10 for trust based on its backing by established firms.

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict on FXIFY Futures
verdictBlocks.body:
FXIFY Futures provides a clear path to funded futures trading with no time limits, high profit splits, and structured risk management. The FFX Platform is proprietary, which may not suit traders who prefer NinjaTrader or Rithmic, but it offers TradingView charts and real-time CME data.

The payout system is structured, with tiered withdrawals and a buffer zone, meaning traders must manage expectations when it comes to early withdrawals. However, with no recurring fees after funding, a scalable profit split, and transparent pricing, it remains a strong choice for serious futures traders.

faq.q: What is the best brokerage to trade futures?
faq.a: FXIFY Futures is the best brokerage alternative for prop traders, scoring 88/100 in our analysis for its one-step evaluation and no time limits. In comparison, Topstep, another one of the top futures prop firms, scored 83/100, making FXIFY Futures a stronger choice for traders looking for scalable payouts and transparent funding rules.

Yes, FXIFY offers a dedicated futures prop trading firm through FXIFY Futures, which provides funded accounts up to $150K with a one-step evaluation and no time limits. Unlike FXIFY's CFD-focused prop firm, FXIFY Futures is specifically designed for traders looking to access equity, forex, commodity, and bond futures with real-time CME data.

Yes, FXIFY Futures processes bi-weekly withdrawals through Riseworks, provided traders meet the buffer zone requirements. The payout structure is tiered, meaning the percentage of profits available for withdrawal increases over time. Traders must pass KYC verification before receiving payouts, which can be withdrawn via bank transfer or cryptocurrency.

FXIFY Futures pays traders through Riseworks, with bi-weekly withdrawals available 14 days after the first trade on a funded account. Payouts increase over time based on a tiered withdrawal model, starting at 60% of profits above the buffer zone and scaling up to 100% after the fifth withdrawal. Payments can be processed via bank transfer or crypto.

faq.q: Who is the founder of FXIFY?
faq.a: FXIFY was founded by a team of prop trading and brokerage professionals, though specific names have not been publicly disclosed. The firm is linked to FXPIG, a regulated forex broker, and has expanded to offer both CFD and futures trading through FXIFY Futures and FXIFY for CFD prop trading.
